changes: Added custom AuthException classes with specific error codes
Added UserAlreadyExistsException for duplicate accounts
Added InvalidCredentialsException for wrong password
Added WeakPasswordException for password validation
Added EmailNotConfirmedException for unconfirmed emails
Added NetworkException for connectivity issues
Added AuthStateEvent class for session persistence
Implemented handleDeepLink() for OAuth callbacks
Added proper error handling with try-catch blocks
Map Supabase errors to user-friendly exceptions
Added user-friendly error messages for all auth errors
Mapped 'user_exists' to: 'An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.'
Mapped 'invalid_credentials' to: 'Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.'
Mapped 'weak_password' to: 'Password is too weak. Please use at least 6 characters.'
Mapped 'network_error' to: 'Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.'
Added AuthNeedsEmailConfirmation state for unconfirmed users
Added DeepLinkReceived event for OAuth callbacks
Added _getUserFriendlyError() helper method
Added uni_links import for deep link handling
Added _initDeepLinks() method to handle OAuth callbacks
Added _deepLinkSubscription to listen for incoming links
Added _initAuthStateListener() for session persistence
Added AuthWrapper StatefulWidget to manage deep links
Added error code handling in SnackBar with 'SIGN IN' action for user_exists
Added AuthNeedsEmailConfirmation UI with 'I've Confirmed My Email' button
Updated deep link intent filter with android:autoVerify='true'
Added android:host='auth' to bloodpulse:// scheme
Intent filter now properly handles bloodpulse://auth/callback
Added uni_links: ^0.5.1 dependency for deep link handling

test_cases: Test 2: Sign In with Existing Account
Test 3: Sign In with Wrong Password (Error Message Test)
Test 4: Sign Up with Existing User (Duplicate Account Test)

next_steps: Run 'flutter pub get' in CI/CD environment with Flutter SDK
Run 'flutter build apk --release' to build APK
Upload APK to Appetize.io or physical device
Monitor test results - script will auto-fix and rebuild if tests fail
